EngineeringItem.title: Engineering Item
EngineeringItem.description: A record of an engineering item's unit price and unit.

name.description: The name of the engineering item (e.g., 礦纖明架天花板).

unit.description: The unit of measurement (e.g., 坪, m2, 式).

category.description: The category of the engineering work (e.g., 天花板工程).

vendor.description: The vendor who provided the quote.

date.description: The date the quote was received.

originalUnit.description: The original unit used when the item was first created.

originalPrice.description: The original unit price used when the item was first created.

unitPrices.description: A map of pre-calculated unit prices for all units in the same category.

/items/{itemId}.description: Collection of engineering items and their prices.
